generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dt-vocab
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing raw point cloud data for object detection",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawPointCloudDataTransmitted
]
instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor providing vehicle state information including speed, position, and orientation",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor status and performance metrics",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorStateDataTransmitted
]
instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing steering servo position and movement data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoStateDataTransmitted
]
instance LiDARRawPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]
instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]
instance MotorStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSensor
]
instance SteeringServoStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoSensor
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state and detected objects"
]
instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate and save detailed reports from collected data",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle in the path for adaptive cruise control"
]
instance SpeedCalculationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of appropriate speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]
instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send commands to vehicle actuators for acceleration or braking",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance ACCEnableDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable adaptive cruise control system remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance DesiredSpeedSettingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for adaptive cruise control system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance EmergencyBrakingTriggerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking command remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of vehicle state, projected path, and object tracks via UI with report generation capabilities",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationAction
]
instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and actuation commands processing from ECUs",
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedCalculationInsight, ActuationCommandAction
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allows operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking commands",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisableAction, DesiredSpeedSettingAction, EmergencyBrakingTriggerAction
]
instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for preprocessing sensor data including noise reduction and normalization",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for clustering LiDAR point clouds and tracking detected objects",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component for serializing data, aligning message types, and performing unit conversions in ROS2 network",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance LiDARRawPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloudDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler, DataPreProcessingEnabler
]
instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed, position, and orientation data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]
instance MotorStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor performance metrics data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]
instance SteeringServoStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering servo position and movement data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringServoStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]
instance ThreeDVisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time vehicle state and object tracking display"
]
instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel component for remote ACC management commands"
]
instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationComponent, ControlPanelComponent
]
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataPreProcessingEnabler, PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]
instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LiDARSensor, VehicleStateSensor, MotorSensor, SteeringServoSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the ACC Controlling FE are processed by the Data Translation component for serialization and unit conversion, then transmitted to the Actuation FE which drives motor and steering servo actuation. Communication between components uses ROS2 for internal SW communication and Wi-Fi/UDP for inter-entity."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for device coordination to enable computation offloading, as mandated by hardware limitations; while safety-critical vehicular standards typically require stricter synchronization (<100 ms), the implementation adheres to 100 ms due to current hardware constraints."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, organizing software components into entity-based structures (User, Digital Twin, Physical Twin Entities) with each Functional Entity implemented as ROS2 packages. Resource management and coordination are handled through ROS2 nodes, with the Physical Twin Entity encompassing sensor/actuator interfaces and automotive-specific processing, while the Digital Twin Entity manages data and control mechanisms, and the User Entity handles visualization and control interfaces."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication occurs over a Wi-Fi network using UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system complies with ISO 23247:2021 standard for manufacturing, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles (Part 1), Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements (Part 3), and Information exchange (Part 4). The reference architecture defines an entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity for data acquisition and control, Digital Twin Entity for digital representation, and User Entity for human interaction. Functional Entities handle specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) used for data exchange and device communication."
]
